OptionDescription.SourceString: If for everyone, this uses no instigator. If for a specific Team or Class, it will use a random player on that Team or Class, if per-player, it will save the instigator per player.
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: If for everyone, this uses no instigator. If for a specific Team or Class, it will use a random player on that Team or Class, if per-player, it will save the instigator per player.
